title: Insert Videos and Picture in Hexo
excerpt: Modify Config and Install PluginSet post_asset_folder: true in _config.yml. When you create a new post using hexo new post_name it will create a new foler named post_name besides post_name.md. Install hexo-asset-image plugin:1npm install https://github.com/CodeFalling/hexo-asset-image --save Modify hexo-asset-image plugin in node_modules\hexo-asset-image\index.js: 12345678910111213141516$('img').each(function(){ var src = $(this).attr('src').replace('\\', '/'); src = '/'+src.split('/')[1] //Add this line if(!/http[s]*.*|\/\/.*/.test(src)){ var linkArray = link.split('/').filter(function(elem){ return elem != ''; }); var srcArray = src.split('/').filter(function(elem){ return elem != ''; }); if(linkArray[linkArray.length - 1] == srcArray[0]) srcArray.shift(); src = srcArray.join('/'); $(this).attr('src', '/' + link + src); }});

title: Build a Deep Learning Environment on Ubuntu
Set Server Auto Restart Regularly
excerpt: Set System Time ZoneCheck your system time and time zone by date -R12cp /usr/share/zoneinfo/Asia/Shanghai /etc/localtime# Replace /Asia/Shanghai with the time zone you want to set

title: Install Tensorflow on Windows 10
excerpt: 1 Install CUDA and cuDNNDownload CUDA Toolkit and cuDNN. Choose the version your GPU support. 2 Install Anaconda2.1 Download and install AnacondaDownload Anaconda and tick “Add Anaconda to my PATh environment variable“ during installing. 2.2 Switch the software source of pip and condaDomestic mirrors can accelerate the download speed of installing packages using pip and conda.There are some mirrors in China for both pip and conda.

title: Show latex equations in markdowns for jekyll
excerpt: 1 Install and adopt kramdown gemInstall kramdown using gem.1gem install kramdown Add content below to _config.yml to adopt kramdown1markdown: kramdown
